summary.romanian_executive: Proiect Django + Tailwind pentru site partid politic — API-ul principal exista in app-ul core (sectoare, regiuni, proiecte, membri, donatii, pagini statice), iar apps members/projects/donations sunt momentan schelet. Hardening-ul de productie si infrastructura avansata lipsesc.
summary.italian_short: Progetto Django per un partito politico italiano. Backend, admin, modelli e frontend Tailwind. Mancano alcune configurazioni di produzione.
summary.english_short: Django + Tailwind proof-of-concept for a political party site. Core models and admin present; production and advanced features pending.

next_steps: Frontend presentation Step 3: finalize Italian copy and CTA consistency across 5 pages
Frontend presentation Step 4: add demo form submission states (success/error) without backend dependency
Split business logic from core into dedicated apps (members/projects/donations) or document current architecture
Harden production security settings (SSL redirect, secure cookies, HSTS)
